## PWA Submission — [App Name Here]

<!-- Replace [App Name Here] above with your app's name -->

### Submission Checklist

**Technical requirements — I confirm my PWA:**
- [ ] Is live and accessible at the URL in my YAML file right now
- [ ] Is served over HTTPS with a valid certificate
- [ ] Has a valid Web App Manifest
- [ ] Has a registered and active Service Worker
- [ ] Works offline or shows a meaningful offline fallback page
- [ ] Has a 512×512px icon that loads correctly
- [ ] Achieves a Lighthouse PWA score of 85 or above

**Listing requirements — I confirm:**
- [ ] I own or have authorized rights to this domain
- [ ] My description is accurate and not misleading
- [ ] This app has not been submitted before under a different name
- [ ] The `submitted_by` field in my YAML matches my GitHub username
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Submission Guide](../SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md)

**Content — I confirm this PWA:**
- [ ] Does not contain malware, phishing, or deceptive content
- [ ] Does not impersonate another app, brand, or service
- [ ] Uses legitimate payment processors if it charges users
- [ ] Complies with applicable laws in its target markets
